channel.title: CTFtime upcoming events (local cache)
channel.description: Generated locally. In production a GitHub Action refreshes this file from https://ctftime.org/event/list/upcoming/rss/

item.title: SekaiCTF 2024
item.description: Annual jeopardy-style CTF hosted by Project Sekai. Web, pwn, crypto, reverse, misc.

item.title: CSAW CTF Qualification Round 2024
item.description: Entry-level quals for the CSAW finals. Great for students and newcomers.

item.title: HITCON CTF 2024 Quals
item.description: One of the most competitive quals of the year. Expect very hard web and pwn.

item.title: BlackHat MEA CTF Qualification
item.description: Gulf region quals with generous prize pool. Beginner-friendly web & forensics.

item.title: DefCamp CTF 2024 Quals
item.description: European CTF organized alongside DefCamp Bucharest.

item.title: Hack.lu CTF 2024
item.description: Legendary European CTF. Hard reverse and web, signature style.

item.title: DamCTF 2024
item.description: OSU Security Club’s flagship event. Friendly, high-quality challenges.
